name: content-marketer
description: Elite content marketing strategist specializing in AI-powered
capabilities: Develop comprehensive content strategies aligned with business objectives and target audience needs
Create AI-optimized blog posts, social captions, and email sequences using modern tools
Implement advanced SEO techniques including semantic optimization and schema markup
Design omnichannel distribution plans across social media, email, and content platforms
Build content performance analytics frameworks with conversion tracking and ROI measurement
Generate content calendars with editorial planning and seasonal campaign integration
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code, network calls, or file system access. Static analysis scanned 0 files and detected 0 security issues with a risk score of 0/100. The skill provides content marketing guidance and best practices through natural language prompts only. No dangerous patterns or malicious intent detected.
valueStatement: Content marketers struggle to scale quality content across channels while maintaining SEO performance. This skill delivers AI-powered strategies for content creation, distribution, and optimization that drive engagement and revenue.
userTitle: Create high-converting content strategies with AI
limitations: Cannot directly execute content publishing or post to social media platforms
Requires manual implementation of recommended tools and automation platforms
Does not have real-time access to analytics data or live SERP rankings
AI-generated content recommendations require human review for brand alignment

useCases.title: SaaS Product Launch Campaign
useCases.description: Create a comprehensive multi-channel content strategy for launching a new SaaS product, including blog posts, social media campaigns, email sequences, and thought leadership articles to drive awareness and conversions.

useCases.title: E-commerce SEO Content Optimization
useCases.description: Optimize product descriptions, category pages, and blog content for search visibility and conversion, implementing AI-powered keyword research and semantic SEO techniques.

useCases.title: Social Media Automation Workflow
useCases.description: Design an automated social media content system with AI-generated captions, scheduling workflows, and engagement strategies across LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram platforms.

promptTemplates.title: Beginner: Create a Blog Content Calendar
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me create a 30-day content calendar for my [industry] blog. I want to target [audience] with topics about [themes]. Include post titles, target keywords, and publishing schedule.
promptTemplates.scenario: New content marketers needing structured editorial planning

promptTemplates.title: Intermediate: Optimize Content for SEO
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my blog post about [topic] and optimize it for search engines. Target keyword is [keyword]. Improve the title, meta description, headings, and suggest internal linking opportunities.

promptTemplates.title: Advanced: Multi-Channel Distribution Strategy
promptTemplates.prompt: I have a flagship whitepaper about [topic]. Create a distribution strategy that repurposes this into blog posts, social media threads, email sequences, LinkedIn articles, and video scripts. Include timeline and metrics for each channel.

promptTemplates.title: Expert: AI-Powered Content Operations System
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a complete AI-powered content operations workflow for our [company size] team. Include tool recommendations for ideation, writing, SEO optimization, distribution, and analytics. Define roles, processes, and quality control checkpoints.
promptTemplates.scenario: Marketing leaders building scalable content systems

bestPractices: Always define clear content objectives and KPIs before creating any content assets
Use AI for ideation and drafts but maintain human oversight for brand voice and accuracy
Repurpose flagship content across multiple formats and channels to maximize ROI
antiPatterns: Publishing AI-generated content without human review and fact-checking
Creating content without keyword research or audience persona alignment
Focusing on vanity metrics instead of conversion and revenue attribution

faq.question: What AI tools does this skill recommend for content creation?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance on tools like Agility Writer, ContentBot, and Jasper for AI writing, plus Canva and Midjourney for visuals. Specific recommendations depend on your budget, team size, and use case.

faq.question: Can this skill directly post content to my social media accounts?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides strategy and content recommendations only. You will need to manually implement posts or integrate with automation tools like Buffer or Hootsuite separately.

faq.question: How does this skill help with SEO optimization?
faq.answer: It provides keyword research strategies, semantic SEO implementation guidance, schema markup recommendations, and techniques for optimizing content for featured snippets and voice search.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for e-commerce content marketing?
faq.answer: Yes, it includes specific capabilities for product description optimization, category page SEO, customer review integration, and abandoned cart email sequences for e-commerce businesses.

faq.question: Can this skill help measure content marketing ROI?
faq.answer: Yes, it provides frameworks for conversion tracking, attribution modeling, cohort analysis, and lifetime value measurement to connect content efforts to business outcomes.

faq.question: Does this skill work with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is fully compatible with all three platforms. The prompt templates and strategies work identically across Claude, Codex, and Claude Code interfaces.
